title: AIApplication - Metadata API
description: Represents an instance of an AI application. For example, Einstein Prediction Builder.

developerName.description: Represents the name of the application. Can contain only underscores and alphanumeric characters and must be unique in your org. It must begin with a letter, not include spaces, not end with an underscore, and not contain two consecutive underscores. Note: Only users with View DeveloperName OR View Setup and Configuration permission can view, group, sort, and filter this field.

masterLabel.description: Label that identifies the AI application throughout the Salesforce user interface.

status.description: The status of the application. Valid values are: Disabled Draft Enabled Migrated

type.description: The type of AI application. Valid values are: PredictionBuilder
